title: Lachnagrostis polypogonoides
taxonomy: Lachnagrostis polypogonoides is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Lachnagrostis, which is a group of temperate and subtropical grasses. The species is native to the Southern Hemisphere, particularly in Australia, New Zealand, and parts of South America. Lachnagrostis polypogonoides is further categorized under the subfamily Danthonioideae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other grass species.
